steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage requires a narrative that begins with a specific athlete’s story, using their career details. The strongest signal is that the narrative focuses on one athlete (not both) and uses career-chronological details (e.g., teams, rushing yards) as a launchpad.

steps.title: Match the narrative structure
steps.content: Choice B introduces Martin by anchoring the narrative in the beginning of his career, using the Patriots as a concrete starting point (per the notes) while hinting at his future achievements. The other choices either compare both athletes (A, C), or focus on outcomes rather than a career’s outset (D). That matches choice B — B is correct.
